channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Mendacity of Graham Platner
item.description: The scandal-plagued Maine Democrat has no record to run on, so voters have only his word. But he has left them no reason to trust anything he says.

item.title: The Four Sources of Voters’ Economic Rage
item.description: American Dream costs are constraining household budgets, even when other economic indicators look good.

item.title: Nithya Raman overtakes Spencer Pratt in L.A. mayoral race
item.description: Nithya Raman, a progressive member of the Los Angeles City Council, surpassed reality-TV star Spencer Pratt in the Los Angeles mayoral primary Sunday,...

item.title: Bernie Sanders’s ‘Wealth Fund’ Scheme Has Already Been Tried
item.description: A failed Swedish experiment should be a cautionary tale for the Vermont senator’s AI plan.
